description: 3-way hose-barb tee for 6 mm ID tubing. Splits one line into two, or merges two into one.
use_cases: split watering line into two zones

description: Push-fit 90° elbow for 6 mm pneumatic tubing. Insert tube, locks; press collet to release.
notes: Not pre-installed — push the cut tube in until it stops, then pull gently to confirm engagement.

description: Two-piece quick-disconnect coupler. Push to mate, press a button to release. Some models include shutoff valves on each half.
use_cases: service-friendly water connection (e.g. pull tank without tools)
notes: Self-shutoff variants are great for pumps that should not run dry — disconnect and the water stays in the line.

description: Threaded-to-barb adapter — connects a 1/4" NPT female port (typical pump body or solenoid) to 6 mm hose tubing.
use_cases: adapt a 1/4 NPT pump outlet to 6 mm silicone
interface household plumbing to 6 mm hose
notes: NPT is tapered — use PTFE thread tape for a sealed threaded joint. Not pressure-rated for sustained > ~200 kPa with plain barb.

spec: polypropylene barb reducer, 8 mm to 6 mm
description: Step-down barb reducer — 8 mm hose on one side, 6 mm on the other. For mixing tube sizes in a single line.
use_cases: transition from a pump's 8 mm outlet to 6 mm distribution lines
